provider_settings.title: ⚙️ LLM Endpoint & Models
provider_settings.description: Configure your AI endpoints and generation models.

data_description.llm_backend_type: Select the platform powering your primary chat model.
data_description.llm_url: The full network address to your LLM API (e.g., http://localhost:11434).
data_description.llm_api_key: Leave blank for local Ollama. Required for OpenAI or cloud proxies.
data_description.llm_model: The specific model to use for conversation and tool-calling.
data_description.embed_backend_type: Backend used specifically for embeddings/RAG. Select 'None' to disable vector searching.
data_description.embed_url: Address for the embedding API (e.g., http://localhost:11434).
data_description.embed_api_key: Required if using a protected cloud endpoint for embeddings.
data_description.embedding_model: The model used to convert text into vector embeddings (e.g., nomic-embed-text).
data_description.vector_db_backend: Select your Vector Database software (Currently Qdrant only supported). Select 'None' to disable vector searching.
data_description.vector_db_url: The network address for your vector database (e.g., http://localhost:6333).
data_description.vector_db_api_key: Authentication key for your vector database, if configured.

tuning_settings.title: 🎛️ Context & Parameters
tuning_settings.description: Adjust context windows, temperatures, and base instructions.

data_description.Instructions: The core personality and strict operational rules for the AI. This overrides standard Home Assistant prompts.
data_description.dynamic_suffix: Appended to the user prompt to maximize cache efficiency. Use this for dynamic elements in your prompts. You can use these live placeholders: '{location_name}', '{day_of_week}', '{date_str}', '{current_time}'.
data_description.thinking: Allows reasoning models to output hidden thinking tokens (like [think] blocks) before answering. Disable for standard models.
data_description.enable_streaming: Streams response audio as soon as the first token is received.
data_description.enable_parallel_tools: Excecutes tools in parallel for models that support it.  Tool calls targetting the same device are still sequintial.
data_description.temperature: Higher values make output more creative, lower values make it more focused and deterministic.
data_description.top_p: Limits word choice to a percentage of the most probable options. Lower values increase focus.
data_description.top_k: Limits the AI to choosing from only the top K most likely next words.
data_description.repeat_penalty: Strictness against the AI repeating the same phrases. 1.0 = disabled.
data_description.max_history: The maximum number of previous messages to remember in a single conversation thread.
data_description.num_ctx: The max token context window the AI can use per request. Higher numbers require more VRAM.
data_description.num_predict: The maximum number of tokens the AI is allowed to generate in a single response.
data_description.mirostat: An algorithm that actively maintains the quality and perplexity of generated text during long outputs.
data_description.keep_alive: How long Ollama should keep the models loaded in VRAM after a request (-1 for indefinite, 0 to unload immediately).

tool_settings.title: 🛠️ Tool & Device Management
tool_settings.description: Manage which tools and devices are accessible.

data_description.max_tool_iterations: The maximum number of sequential tool calls the AI can make in a single turn before being forced to reply. (Default: 5)
data_description.device_injection_strategy: Dictates which smart home entities are injected into the system prompt context.
data_description.injection_specific_rooms: If the 'Static' strategy is selected above, specify exactly which rooms should be visible to the AI.
data_description.blacklisted_tools: Select any tools from this list that you want to permanently hide from the AI. Blacklisted tools will never be injected into the prompt.
data_description.tool_injection_limit: The maximum number of relevant tools the vector database is allowed to inject into a single prompt. (Default: 3)
data_description.tool_cosine_threshold: The minimum mathematical confidence score required for a tool to be considered relevant to the user's prompt. Lower values allow more ambigious tools; higher values require a stricter match. (Default: 0.30)
data_description.clear_cache_now: WARNING: Toggle to delete the tool cache and force the AI to re-learn tool habits.

memory_settings.title: 🧠 Memory Settings
memory_settings.description: Configure your vector database for semantic search and facts.

data_description.enable_memory_injection: Turn off to disable RAG memory retrieval entirely and only use the vector database for tool selection.
data_description.memory_collections: Type a Qdrant collection name and press Enter to add it. You can query multiple collections (e.g., schedules, facts, preferences).
data_description.memory_injection_limit: Maximum number of total facts/memories per collection injected into a single prompt turn. (Default: 3)
data_description.memory_cosine_threshold: Minimum confidence score for a memory/fact to be considered relevant. (Default: 0.50)
